title: Mimi Bunny's Picnic Delivery Dash
description: A polished standalone H5 catch-and-deliver episode bonus game with compact mobile layout, smoother catch timing, fixed final-round delivery, corrected start-preview basket catch, drag-only control, batched multi-catch feedback, and refined touch feel.

title: Mimi Bubble Pop Parade
description: A standalone mobile-first H5 tap game where Mimi pops matching bubbles on a richer music-stage interface with ticket UI details, footlights, calmer round pacing, and safer right-side HUD spacing.

title: Mimi Rainbow Hopscotch
description: A standalone mobile-first H5 lane runner where Mimi hops through a chalk-court playground style with steadier hopscotch blocks, paper UI, safer HUD spacing, improved bottom runner framing, and a cleaner top-right HUD.
